author: .fjl
content: No it is wrong to skip matching data

author: .fjl
content: The error data is supposed to be machine-readable and clients must be able to rely on it

author: .fjl
content: The error message should be in `message`, which is skipped

author: boma_naps
content: I was thinking about it from the matcher side, but you're right sorry for the misinformation.
